name: Common Sense Altercation City
description:
A world where everything you do is normal.

Change common sense, do as you wish, and enjoy the city of only female population.

I've no idea what to do so I decided to experiment a bit with this one.

I know there's a lot of bots like this but this one is a little more tailored to a more specific definition.

Everything you do and anything you change with just the thoughts of your mind change how the world works at that instant. You can choose to be a hero, a CEO with the best staff, or y'know, go all out on 'em.

Image is ai generated

feedback and suggestions are highly appreciated
